        "A": "4, ['Request for compliance verification with German freelancer regulations (compliance structuring, audit submission) – not represented in template', 'Discussion of professional liability insurance as a separate coverage type – no dedicated field for professional or business liability', 'Equipment insurance for photography gear (Gewerbliche Sachversicherung / Elektronikversicherung) – not clearly mapped to property insurance fields limited to personal property', 'Request for provider names or plan identifiers from user – not represented in template fields']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "11, ['Health insurance coverage (physical health, mental health) with costs and tiers', 'Travel insurance including adventure and business travel protection', 'Property insurance with electronics coverage and temporary accommodation', 'Coverage for preventive care, telemedicine, stress management, and wellness programs', 'Monthly cost and currency specification', 'Deductible percentage and coverage tier details', 'Global coverage and emergency support attributes', 'Compliance with mandatory health insurance requirements – partly captured under plan_type and geographic_coverage', 'Comparison of plan options (InsurePlus vs VitalPlus) with costs – fits proposal_presentation and comparison_metrics', 'Request for user current coverage details (health, property, liability) – fits information_request fields', 'Geographic context: Germany as country of residence – fits geographic_coverage.primary_residence_country']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Request for compliance verification with German freelancer regulations (compliance structuring, audit submission) – not represented in template', 'Discussion of professional liability insurance as a separate coverage type – no dedicated field for professional or business liability', 'Equipment insurance for photography gear (Gewerbliche Sachversicherung / Elektronikversicherung) – not clearly mapped to property insurance fields limited to personal property', 'Request for provider names or plan identifiers from user – not represented in template fields']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 11, ['Health insurance coverage (physical health, mental health) with costs and tiers', 'Travel insurance including adventure and business travel protection', 'Property insurance with electronics coverage and temporary accommodation', 'Coverage for preventive care, telemedicine, stress management, and wellness programs', 'Monthly cost and currency specification', 'Deductible percentage and coverage tier details', 'Global coverage and emergency support attributes', 'Compliance with mandatory health insurance requirements – partly captured under plan_type and geographic_coverage', 'Comparison of plan options (InsurePlus vs VitalPlus) with costs – fits proposal_presentation and comparison_metrics', 'Request for user current coverage details (health, property, liability) – fits information_request fields', 'Geographic context: Germany as country of residence – fits geographic_coverage.primary_residence_country']
